channel.title: Supply Chain on Custom Paper Box Manufacturer | Rigid Gift Boxes, Folding Cartons, Corrugated Mailers, Magnetic Closure, Jewelry Boxes | ISO 9001 & FSC Certified | Bincai
channel.description: Recent content in Supply Chain on Custom Paper Box Manufacturer | Rigid Gift Boxes, Folding Cartons, Corrugated Mailers, Magnetic Closure, Jewelry Boxes | ISO 9001 & FSC Certified | Bincai

item.title: In-House Corrugated Board: How Bincai's BHS 2.5m Corrugator Eliminates the Supply Chain Gap
item.description:
The Corrugated Problem Most Buyers Don’t See

When you order 50,000 custom e-commerce mailers, the printing and die-cutting are only half the story. The other half — the corrugated board itself — typically comes from a different factory. A paper mill you’ve never visited. With quality standards you’ve never verified.

This supply chain gap creates three problems:
